title: Section 501
content: (1) As soon as may be after the 1st day of April in every year and not later than such date as may be fixed by the 1 *** Government in this behalf, 2[3[the Corporation]] shall submit to that Government a detailed report of the municipal government of Delhi during the preceding year in such form as that Government may direct. (2) The Commissioner shall prepare such report and 2[3[the Corporation]] shall consider it and forward the same to the 1 *** Government with its resolution thereon, if any. (3) Copies of the report shall be kept for sale at the municipal office.
footnote: 1. The word Central omitted by Act 67 of 1993, s. 128 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 2. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2, for “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 3. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “a Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
